Hello world. This is a basic dictation test.

This sentence has a comma, a period, a question mark, and an exclamation point.

Open parenthesis hello comma world close parenthesis.

Open quote yes close quote.

Open single quote yes yes yes close single quote.

Open double quote this should be wrapped in double quotes close double quote.

Single quote short phrase single quote.

The price is twenty five dollars and ninety nine cents.

The meeting is at three thirty PM on Friday.

I have one hundred twenty three apples and four thousand five hundred oranges.

My email is test at example dot com.

Visit gee pee tee dot com and ask about H T T P APIs.

New line.
This should be on the next line.

Tab item one.
Tab item two.

Start a list colon new line.
Tab first item new line.
Tab second item new line.
Tab third item.

Open parenthesis one comma two comma three close parenthesis.

Open quote hello comma are you there question mark close quote.

Open single quote do not panic close single quote.

I use Rust comma Tokio comma ONNX runtime comma and Hyprland.

This is a noisy cleanup test comma close quote.

Open quote this phrase has spaces inside close quote.

Open parenthesis open quote nested quote close quote close parenthesis.

The shortcut should not get stuck after this recording ends.

Final sentence. If this appears correctly, transcription, normalization, cleanup, and injection are working.
